content:
You haven't given us any information to guess what might be wrong. Please tell us any and all error messages you see, word-for-word and in full. Screen shots might be sufficient.

Also, what version of Thunderbird? What is your OS? Is this a POP3 or IMAP account? Have you confirmed your server settings compared to what they recommend on their web site?

https://www.optimum.net/FAQ/#/answers/a_id/216
creator: rednoise

content:
The sender may use a different encryption method that is not compatible with your Thunderbird. You can ask the sender to resent the email using an encryption method that Thunderbird knows.

https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/digitally-signing-and-encrypting-messages
creator: wxie2016
